title: Statistics
summary: This is a navigation portal page for the Bank of Canada's statistical data offerings, listing available data categories including exchange rates, interest rates, money market yields, price indexes, and economic indicators. The page provides access to data lookup tools and API documentation but contains no specific data values, publication dates, policy decisions, or market-moving information.
key_points: This is a listing/navigation page for Bank of Canada statistical resources, not a specific data release or research document
Available data categories listed include: daily exchange rates, money market yields, key monetary policy variables, treasury bill yields, bond yields, and price indexes
The page provides access to the Canadian Effective Exchange Rate (CEER) index and Canadian Overnight Repo Rate Average (CORRA)
Data is available via lookup tools, downloadable formats (XML, JSON, CSV), and a Valet API
Publication times are listed for data updates (exchange rates: 16:30 ET; interest rates: 12:15-12:30 ET; bond yields: 09:30-10:00 ET)
Staff economic projections are noted as released once yearly with a five-year lag
No specific numerical data, policy announcements, or macro catalysts are contained in this page
why_it_matters: This page serves as a directory to Bank of Canada statistical resources but does not itself contain actionable macro information. It is not a data release, research paper, or policy document—merely a catalog of available data feeds.
notes: Non-archivable listing page. No specific publication date, no actual data values, no policy content. Per CORE RULE 6, listing and navigation pages should be marked as such. Topic is 'macro catalysts' per TARGET but this source is merely a data catalog with no specific macro catalyst content.
